_note: Manual mob-level estimates derived from in-game /con (consider) colour relative to the player's level AT THE TIME of the con. The game logs neither character level nor con results, so these are eyeballed and ROUGH — they are clearly flagged as estimates in the UI, will be adjusted as more cons are recorded, and some mobs genuinely span a level range. Used to fill the home 'Best value by level' brackets (and mob pages) where the wiki has no level. The wiki's level always wins when it has one.

_conModel.note: Estimated mob level = the player's level when they conned it + the offset for that colour. Rough first pass — expect to refine the boundaries as data comes in.
_conModel.caveats: Boundaries are estimates and may shift as data accumulates; treat every derived level as approximate. Some mobs span a level range.
